## Why It Works

This particular Tweet did extremely well because it's basically wordplay. I took the word luxury and attached it to things (sleep, thinking, movement) that are generally never described that way. Furthermore, I made those things even more luxurious by insinuating the world is intentionally designed to keep you from achieving them.

## Template

Modern [true value] is the ability to [ideal state 1], [ideal state 2], [ideal state 3], and [ideal state 4] in a world designed to prevent all four.

## Example

Here's an example using the template, written from the perspective of a personal trainer:

Modern fitness is the ability to breathe deeply, move intentionally, recover fully, and progress steadily in a world designed to keep you sedentary, rushed, stressed, and stagnant.
